display_text: Ember Spirit Aghanim's Scepter: Increases Fire Remnant cast range, initial speed, and maximum charges. This upgrade enhances mobility and initiation potential, allowing Ember Spirit to traverse the map faster and engage or disengage from fights more effectively. It counters mobility-dependent heroes by enabling rapid repositioning and improved map control.
search_text: Ember Spirit Aghanim Scepter mobility initiation disengage reposition map control

display_text: Ember Spirit Aghanim's Shard: Replenishes Fire Remnant charge upon enemy hero death nearby. This upgrade synergizes with teamfight dominance, turning Ember Spirit into a relentless chase-and-pursuit hero who can sustain mobility throughout extended engagements. It counters tanky or grouped-up enemies by ensuring continuous high-mobility pressure.
search_text: Ember Spirit Aghanim Shard teamfight chase pursuit sustain mobility relentless pressure
